description: Chat with a local Ollama model from a side panel in your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Tom Han
manifest.description: Chat with a local Ollama model from a side panel in your vault.
manifest.name: VaultLlama

name: VaultLlama

releases.author: TomHan518
releases.description:
Initial public release of VaultLlama.

Features:
- Chat with local Ollama models in Obsidian
- Use selection or note context
- Copy and insert AI responses
- Desktop-only release
